name: LIT
description: LIT is a social network app (not decentralised 🙁), that is some kind of a mix of Twitter, Discord, Telegram or something. I'm planning to release it after Q4 2021.

name: AutiOne Website v2
description: New version of my website. It's a chat-like website with this FB Messenger style. I'd really like to receive feedback about the website, feel free to contact me about it.

name: MCCalc
description: Products calculator for my Minecraft SMP. It calculates an entire purchase because I'm too lazy to do all the sums, divisions and multiplications.
